title: Sweet Spicy Algerian Chicken Tagine
description: A flavorful and aromatic North African dish made with chicken, palm sugar, and spices, perfect for special occasions or everyday meals.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in the bottom of a clay or ceramic tagine or a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is softened and lightly browned, about 8 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the chicken to the pot and cook until it is browned on all sides, about 5-7 minutes.
Add the palm sugar, ground cumin, smoked paprika, and cayenne pepper to the pot and stir to combine.
Pour in the chicken broth and bring the mixture to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, until the chicken is cooked through and the sauce has thickened, about 25-30 minutes.
Stir in the chopped dried apricots and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
Season the tagine with salt and pepper to taste, then serve hot over couscous or rice.
